name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Spec Kit-style app workflow plugin for Bears functional baselines, waves, functional graphs, task ledgers, instruction hardening, role-matched subagents, and parallel app development orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: App functional baseline, wave specification, planning, hardening, analysis, and subagent orchestration.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides a Spec Kit-style application workflow: a short app constitution functional baseline, app-local AGENTS alignment, research waves, detailed specification, functional graph planning, ledger tasks, read-only wave instruction hardening, role-matched subagents, parallel L2/L3 app-dev orchestration, and autoCI-owned script evidence.
capabilities: Parallel planning by disjoint target sets
defaultPrompt: Create app constitution baseline and align app-local AGENTS.
Plan ready wave with role-matched subagents.
Dev ready wave with parallel L2/L3 subagents.
